title: DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM - 211info
text: LANE COUNTY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES SERVICES DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services such as include case management; individual and family support plans; access to brokerage services for transportation; in-home supports or residential placement; and employment and vocational services. 125 E 8th Avenue Basement Level Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals with an intellectual or developmental disability. Applicant must be an Oregon resident and a U.S. citizen. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (541) 682-3695 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-3695 Español (541) 682-3700 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for application FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of citizenship, proof of address, and records of any/all psychological and medical assessments related to the disability. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Disabilities Issues Case/Care Management * Disabilities Issues Disability Related Center Based Employment Disability Related Parenting Programs Disability Related Transportation Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LANE COUNTY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES SERVICES
